name: Webpack
description: A static module bundler for modern JavaScript applications, optimizing assets for production.

name: Lodash
description: Lodash is a JavaScript library that helps programmers write more concise and maintainable JavaScript

name: Sass
description: A CSS preprocessor with features like variables, nesting, and mixins for efficient styling.

name: ESLint
description: A pluggable linting utility for JavaScript and TypeScript, enforcing code quality.

name: Prettier
description: An opinionated code formatter for consistent styling across JavaScript, CSS, and more.

name: Jest
description: A delightful JavaScript testing framework with a focus on simplicity and performance.

name: Husky
description: A tool to manage Git hooks, ensuring code quality checks before commits.

name: Babel
description: A JavaScript compiler to transform modern JavaScript for broader browser compatibility.
